title: Viral inactivation of clinical samples
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8pnsc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"av1sa","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"9nb01","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4sjt3","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"5gahj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ie24","text":"Purpose of examination / Clinical relevance","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":43}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d8jfn","text":"At the end of 2019, several pneumonia cases were reported in Wuhan, China and the pathogen was confirmed as a new viral strain. World Health organization has named the newly identified coronavirus as 2019-nCoV, also known as SARS-Cov-2. The disease developed into a dangerous pandemic, posing major challenges to the NHS. Although more research is necessary to better understand the virus, in response to the emergency, simple and rapid testing is essential to identify the virus in infected individuals. This will aid the implementation of efficient interventions to contain the spread, and distinguish healthcare workers who have been infected, and are required to self-isolate, from those showing similar symptoms but which are not 2019-nCoV associated. The latter category may continue to work, alleviating stress on hard-pressed healthcare resources. 2019-nCoV is an RNA virus, and the diagnostic tests detect viral RNA in swabs from patient airways using a reverse transcriptase PCR assay. Samples are submitted to HSL, an accredited reporting laboratory, and transferred to the Crick for testing. The first step of the process is sample receipt at the Crick. This SOP describes the inactivation of the virus.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"53kto","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"notes","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"length":38,"offset":29}],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"4r9td","text":"This protocol is part of the Crick COVID-19 RT-PCR Testing Pipeline collection.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{"0":{"data":{"guid":"E72B6110970211EAA1FA5346C75055DA","url":"https://www.protocols.io/private/9BA5EEFF847911EA9B0C0242AC110002"},"mutability":"","type":"link"}}}},"1":{"type":"safety","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"ei8nv","text":"This work involves handling and processing of clinical nasal or throat Swab samples from NHS staff or patients who are suspected of being infected SARS-CoV-2.","type":"unstyled"},{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"5n0nf","text":"➢ This SOP is to be followed in order to avoid infection exposure to the virus","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}

warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"elo8b","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dobj8","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"2247b","text":"Safety Information – routes of infection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bn33e","text":"Person-to-person spread is thought to occur mainly via","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5n87j","text":"respiratory droplets produced when an infected person coughs or sneezes or","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dpbip","text":"contact with droplets and contaminated fomites.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a5h99","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ct5f3","text":"Restrictions","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b65bf","text":"Access to CL2/3 facility is restricted to authorised personnel only.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dpf61","text":"Only those with health clearance and have been signed off as trained and competent by both their manager and SHS are allowed to undertake this work within the CL2/3 Facility.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"hph1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a41qj","text":"Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"65qdh","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"ebta7","text":"Anyone entering the CL2/3 facility must wear the following PPE","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b5qd6","text":"A Purple Howie style lab coat which must be worn at all times.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5k7ph","text":"Orange nitrile or neoprene disposable gloves","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a0rdc","text":"Staff processing samples will wear additional PPE whilst working within the Microbiological safety cabinets (MBSC)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"26eul","text":"A second pair of blue nitrile or neoprene disposable gloves","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"19lh5","text":"Over-sleeves","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4bdu8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1kmdi","text":"Safety Information – Procedures for dealing with accidents and incidents ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":73}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"46m6u","text":"Injury and/or personal contamination","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":36},{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":36}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4c8o4","text":"Needlestick: Encourage to bleed. Wash affected area with soap and warm water. Report immediately by dialling emergency number at any time.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fftuu","text":"Eye splash: Irrigate thoroughly with warm water and report immediately by dialling emergency number at any time.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4aj45","text":"Mouth: Wash out thoroughly and report by dialling emergency number at any time.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8aamm","text":"Skin: Surface contamination - wash affected area with soap and water. Report by dialling emergency number at any time.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bfuth","text":"Clothing: Remove carefully to avoid creating aerosols at exit to room, leave contaminated clothing at the door margin. Report by dialling emergency number at any time.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"18a7b","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"f2dih","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e7ove","text":"Safety Information – dealing with spillages","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":43}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2u3bp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4395o","text":"Minor, i.e. within a MBSC - with little or no aerosol release:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":62}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ci8a4","text":"Cover with paper towels","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"bjp54","text":"Slowly pour 100% Surfanios/Amphospray over towels and allow a 10 min contact time, meanwhile supervise spillage area. Clean and repeat procedure (dispose of materials in CL2 container). ","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cdbf9","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6kamk","text":"Serious spillage and/or production of significant aerosols (including personal contamination):","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":94}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a3a6f","text":"Instruct all personnel to leave.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3l3gu","text":"Ensure the lab door is shut.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7qa6f","text":"Prevent further entry.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ck86t","text":"Deal with any contamination involving skin, clothing etc. (see above).","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8t3fc","text":"Dial emergency number and inform the Health \u0026 Safety Team, who will deal with the spillage.","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"safety","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"a71fo","text":"This work involves handling and processing of clinical nasal or throat Swab samples from NHS staff or patients who are suspected of being infected SARS-CoV-2.","type":"unstyled"},{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"1b9gh","text":"","type":"unstyled"},{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"n60c","text":"Work with live viruses is usually performed in CL3 labs but there is a derogation to allow diagnostic work with samples of unknown status to be carried out at CL2. The CL2 area must be isolated and secured from unauthorised access.","type":"unstyled"},{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"dbcss","text":"","type":"unstyled"},{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"ddg9r","text":"➢ This SOP is to be followed in order to avoid infection exposure to the virus","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}},"1":{"type":"safety","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[],"key":"5skfr","text":"Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) must be worn at all times in the Containment facility.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}},"2":{"type":"safety","mutability":"","data":{"blocks":[{"data":[],"depth":0,"entityRanges":[],"inlineStyleRanges":[{"length":8,"offset":0,"style":"bold"},{"length":28,"offset":9,"style":"bold"}],"key":"d3p6s","text":"Warning: Spillages generate aerosols.","type":"unstyled"}],"entityMap":{}}}}}
